---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or improvement for Renix
title: "feat(<scope>): <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
<!-- One sentence describing what you want to add or change. -->

## Motivation
<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- How should this be implemented? Which files/modules would change? -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- What other approaches did you consider, and why did you reject them? -->

## Compatibility
<!-- Does this require changes to `core/state.py`, `core/interfaces.py`, or `core/graph.py`?
     If yes, explain why this cannot be done as a plugin/ADR change. -->

## Documentation impact
<!-- Which doc files in `docs/` would need updating? -->
